mapper.sql: select u.user_id, u.dept_id, u.user_name, u.nick_name, u.email, u.avatar, u.phone_number, u.password, u.sex, u.status, u.del_flag, u.login_ip, u.login_date, u.create_by, u.create_time, u.remark, u.language, d.dept_id, d.parent_id, d.ancestors, d.dept_name, d.dept_name_en, d.order_num, d.leader, d.status as dept_status, r.role_id, r.role_name, r.role_sort, r.data_scope, r.status as role_status from sys_user u left join sys_dept d on u.dept_id = d.dept_id left join sys_user_role ur on u.user_id = ur.user_id left join sys_role r on r.role_id = ur.role_id
mapper.select: select count(1) from sys_user where user_name = #{userName} and del_flag = '0' limit 1
select count(1) from sys_user where user_name = #{userName} and (object_guid IS NULL OR object_guid != #{uid}) and del_flag = '0' limit 1
select user_id, phone_number from sys_user where phone_number = #{phoneNumber} and del_flag = '0' limit 1
select user_id, email from sys_user where email = #{email} and del_flag = '0' limit 1
mapper.insert: insert into sys_user( user_id, dept_id, user_name, nick_name, email, avatar, phone_number, sex, password, status, create_by, remark, language, create_time )values( #{userId}, #{deptId}, #{userName}, #{nickName}, #{email}, #{avatar}, #{phoneNumber}, #{sex}, #{password}, #{status}, #{createBy}, #{remark}, #{language}, now() )

insert into SYS_USER ( USER_ID, DEPT_ID, USER_NAME, NICK_NAME, EMAIL, PHONE_NUMBER, PASSWORD, CREATE_BY, CREATE_TIME, DOMAIN_ID, OBJECT_GUID, LANGUAGE )values
( #{item.userId}, #{item.deptId}, #{item.userName}, #{item.nickName}, #{item.email}, #{item.phoneNumber}, #{item.password}, #{item.createBy}, #{item.createTime}, #{item.domainId}, #{item.objectGuid}, #{item.language} )
mapper.delete:
update sys_user set del_flag = '2' where user_id in
#{userId}
mapper.select: SELECT U.USER_ID, U.USER_NAME FROM SYS_USER U LEFT JOIN SYS_DEPT D ON U.DEPT_ID = D.DEPT_ID WHERE U.DEL_FLAG = '0'
SELECT OBJECT_GUID FROM SYS_USER WHERE DOMAIN_ID = #{domainId} AND DEL_FLAG = '0'
SELECT USER_ID, USER_NAME, NICK_NAME, PHONE_NUMBER, EMAIL, OBJECT_GUID, CREATE_TIME, DOMAIN_ID FROM SYS_USER WHERE DOMAIN_ID = #{domainId} AND DEL_FLAG = '0'
SELECT USER_ID, USER_NAME, NICK_NAME, PHONE_NUMBER, EMAIL, OBJECT_GUID, CREATE_TIME, DOMAIN_ID FROM SYS_USER WHERE OBJECT_GUID = #{uid} AND DEL_FLAG = '0'
SELECT * FROM SYS_USER WHERE STATUS = '0' AND DEL_FLAG = '0'

SELECT SYS_USER.USER_NAME FROM SYS_USER WHERE STATUS = '0' AND DEL_FLAG = '0'
AND DEPT_ID IN (SELECT DEPT_ID FROM SYS_DEPT START WITH DEPT_ID=#{deptId} CONNECT BY PRIOR DEPT_ID=PARENT_ID)
